general.name: mos_target_visual_binary_gaia_dr3
general.description: El-Badry, Rix, and Heinz Gaia DR3 visual binary catalog (MNRAS 2021). See https://zenodo.org/records/4435257 for details.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_visual_binary_gaia_dr3.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='fits' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another
